title: Kamala Harris backs no tax on tips after Donald Trump suggests policy
shortDescription: Kamala Harris backed the idea of eliminating taxes on tips, taking a similar position to Donald Trump.

title: Independent candidate RFK Jr. gets on the ballot in Nebraska
shortDescription: RFK Jr.'s name will appear on the Cornhusker State's ballot as a nonpartisan presidential candidate.

title: Biden says he was focused on defeating Trump when he ended his reelection bid
shortDescription: President Joe Biden discussed his legacy, concerns for democracy, and the reason he dropped out in a new interview.

title: Kamala Harris calls for eliminating taxes on tips during Nevada rally
shortDescription: Kamala Harris said she supports eliminating taxes on tips and raising minimum wages.

title: Hawaii's congressional leaders sweep Saturday's Democratic primaries
shortDescription: Sen. Mazie Hirono and Reps. Jill Tokuda and Ed Case easily won their Democratic primaries in Hawaii, setting up 2024 matchups for November.

title: She stormed the Capitol for Trump. Now, she’ll be supporting Harris
shortDescription: Pamela Hemphill who once stormed the Capitol for former President Donald Trump will be supporting Vice President Kamala Harris in November.

title: Trump campaign says 'hostile' foreign hackers leaked internal documents
shortDescription: In a statement, the campaign hints that it believes Iran is behind the hack and leak of documents to POLITICO to discredit Trump and sway the election

title: Biden says 'most important thing' is defeating Donald Trump
shortDescription: Joe Biden argued in a new interview scheduled to air Sunday that the “most important thing” this November is beating Donald Trump.

title: Poll: Kamala Harris leads Donald Trump in three key swing states
shortDescription: A new poll released Saturday shows Vice President Kamala Harris leading former President Donald Trump in three key swing states.

title: Trump campaign mocked for playing Titanic theme song at Montana rally
shortDescription: Opponents were quick to mock Trump campaign's usage of Celine Dion's iconic 'Titanic' theme song, 'My Heart Will Go On.'

title: Trump reverts to personal attacks as he struggles against Harris
shortDescription: Some Republicans worry Trump's undisciplined side has become more pronounced as he struggles to define Harris and lashes out with personal attacks.

title: Trump says he has flight records of helicopter trip with ex SF mayor
shortDescription: Here is what really happened on that 2018 helicopter ride in California.

title: Iran ramping up US election meddling. Here's how and why it's doing it
shortDescription: Donald Trump, locked in a tight battle to regain the White House, appears to be the target of Iranian hacking attempts, as he was in 2020.

title: Who will moderate the ABC debate between Harris, Trump?
shortDescription: Kamala Harris and Donald Trump are set to debate each other on ABC Sep. 10. Here's what to know about moderators Linsey Davis and David Muir.

title: Tim Walz has no stocks, no bonds and doesn't own a home
shortDescription: Tim Walz's personal finances are an anomaly in US presidential politics: He has no stocks, bonds, or private equity, and he doesn't even own a home.

title: Kamala Harris and Donald Trump will debate in September | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Trump campaign goes after Tim Walz's military history. How many Americans admit to shoplifting? Giant pandas are on display at San Diego Zoo.

title: Aside from promoting her book, Nancy Pelosi is running for reelection
shortDescription: Nancy Pelosi is busy promoting her new book, but she will also run for reelection in November.

title: Harris 'glad' to debate Trump in September
shortDescription: Donald Trump has proposed two additional debate dates, which Kamala Harris says she is happy to discuss further.

title: Patriotism, polarization, and pommel horse: Olympics and the election
shortDescription: For nearly three weeks, the world watches in awe at the summer Olympic games in Paris. But back home, Americans are more polarized than ever.
